entry.content:
Jawas… filthy traders. Do you need help identifying one of these?

1 Figure
2 Blaster
3 Cloak
4 Guide me

You can reply with a number or describe it.

figure_cape.content:
Start with the easiest visible detail.

What does your Jawa have?

1 Vinyl cape (smooth plastic)
2 Cloth cloak (fabric)
3 No cape or cloak

Reply with a number or describe it.

cloth_choice.content:
A cloth cloaked Jawa. Got it.

Would you like to check:

1 Which cloak version you have
2 Whether the cloak looks original
3 Identify the Jawa figure first

Reply with a number or just type your question.

vinyl_path.content:
Vinyl cape Jawa.

Next step: check the Country of Origin on the legs.

1 Hong Kong
2 Not Hong Kong
3 Can't tell

coo_check.content:
Next step: check the Country of Origin markings on the legs.

1 Hong Kong
2 Not Hong Kong
3 Can't tell

hk_variants.content:
Match your figure:

1 Kader M1
2 Kader M2
3 Unitoy M3
4 Unitoy / Lili Ledy M4

Full guide:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

offer_blaster.content:
Do you want help checking the Jawa blaster?

1 Yes
2 No

blaster_start.content:
Jawa blaster — good.

First check:
Compare it to reference images:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-blaster/

Can you match it?

1 Yes
2 No
3 Not sure

float_test.content:
Next check: float test.

1 Float
2 Sink

colour_check.content:
What colour does it look like?

1 Dark blue / black-blue
2 Black
3 Grey
4 Silver
5 Not sure

black_warning.content:
Black needs caution.

Check under strong light — edges may show blue.

True black originals are usually Brazilian Glasslite (M2 mould).

Compare here:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-blaster/#m2

Next check: rear bump.

1 Long
2 Short
3 None
4 Not sure

bump_check.content:
Check the rear bump.

1 Long
2 Short
3 None
4 Not sure

m2_result.content:
Likely M2 blaster.

Also used for Brazilian Glasslite versions.

Compare:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-blaster/#m2

repro_result.content:
This points strongly to a reproduction.

Compare carefully with reference:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-blaster/

cloak_start.content:
Describe the cloak or choose:

1 Removable hood
2 Attached hood
3 Not sure

You can also describe it.

m5_info.content:
Removable hood — possible Lili Ledy M5.

Check:
• heavier cotton
• lighter colour
• separate hood

Compare:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

Do you want to:

1 Check authenticity
2 Identify figure

cloak_general.content:
Compare cut, stitching and material here:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

Describe what you see and I’ll guide you further.

cloak_auth.content:
Check:
• ageing
• stitching
• fabric texture

Compare carefully with reference:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

coo_unknown.content:
Try checking under strong light or magnification.

If still unsure, describe what you see.

end.content: Anything else you want to check?
